+BROKEN_FreeBSD_13=	compiler bug

What happened if it doesn't build on 14 too?
13.2 and 12.4 are valid releases, why not investigate build problem first and commit it later?

Also this update is ruin PR 274367 (update to wxWigets 3.2.4) since I will have build errors on 13 and 12 with audacity as consumer and run-test...
